property.name: orderIds
property.label: Order IDs (JSON array or comma-separated)
property.description: Optional: Order IDs to process. If not provided, will be read from URL 'ids' parameter.

property.name: orderIds
property.label: Order IDs (JSON array or comma-separated)
property.description: Optional: Order IDs to process. If not provided, will be read from URL 'ids' parameter.
